subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned toward Our horizon, attained unto My recognition, and quaffed the choice wine of utterance in My Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن توجه الی افقی و فاز بعرفانی و اخذ رحیق البیان باسمی و شرب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @power of prayer
